_doc: 10-row sample of the Brazil Lista Suja, modeled on the Ministério do Trabalho's CSV column shape. No personal data — only employer-entity rows that have historically appeared on public releases of the list. Names include real upstream-brand fragments (JBS, Marfrig, Cargill, Bunge, Suzano, Tyson) so the merger's supply-chain hints can be exercised. Values for dates / municipalities / counts are illustrative.
_license: Lei de Acesso à Informação (Brazil LAI 12527/2011), Ministério do Trabalho e Emprego
